name: Carrot & Raspberry Preserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Place carrots in a pot with enough water to cover.
2. Bring to a boil, covered, and cook until tender. Drain, reserving 1/2 cup of liquid.
3. Puree the carrots and reserved liquid.
4. Transfer to a large pot.
5. Add rhubarb and sugar to the pot and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
6. Bring to a slow boil and simmer gently for 20 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and pour into warm sterile jars. Seal.
